description: Fix E2E test wallet funding amounts — tests were written assuming 1000 XRP faucet but actual faucet gives 100 XRP with base reserve 1 XRP and owner reserve 0.2 XRP per object

userStories.title: Fix fund.ts default and high-amount test files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the shared funding helper and test files that hardcode 25–30 XRP per wallet to be fixed so tests don't fail with tecUNFUNDED_PAYMENT.
acceptanceCriteria: XRPL testnet facts to use throughout: faucet=100 XRP, base reserve=1 XRP, owner reserve=0.2 XRP per object. Budget formula: TICKET_COUNT × 0.2 + N_wallets × amountXrp ≤ 99

tests/e2e/payment/payment.network.test.ts: change all createFunded(..., 25) → createFunded(..., 3); change fundAddress(..., 20) → fundAddress(..., 3); change createFunded(..., 15) → createFunded(..., 3); verify budget passes
tests/e2e/payment/payment.tokens.test.ts: change all createFunded(..., 25) → createFunded(..., 3); verify budget passes
tests/e2e/trust/trust.network.test.ts: change all createFunded(..., 25) → createFunded(..., 3); change all fundAddress(..., 20) → fundAddress(..., 3); verify budget: 30 × 0.2 + N_wallets × 3 ≤ 99

tests/e2e/offer/offer.network.test.ts: change createFunded(client, master, 2, 30) in setupMakerIssuer → createFunded(client, master, 2, 3); change createFunded(..., 25) → createFunded(..., 3); change fundAddress(..., 25) → fundAddress(..., 3); do NOT change --taker-gets/--taker-pays values (XRPL allows placing offers for amounts above current balance); verify budget: TICKET_COUNT × 0.2 + N_wallets × 3 ≤ 99 — reduce TICKET_COUNT if needed

tests/e2e/escrow/escrow.network.test.ts: change createFunded(client, master, 2, 30) → createFunded(client, master, 2, 20) — escrow tests lock XRP so 20 XRP per wallet is necessary; verify budget: 5 × 0.2 + 2 × 20 = 41 ≤ 99

userStories.title: Audit and fix remaining network test files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all remaining network test files audited so no file exceeds the 100 XRP budget.
acceptanceCriteria: XRPL testnet facts: faucet=100 XRP, base reserve=1 XRP, owner reserve=0.2 XRP per object. Budget formula: TICKET_COUNT × 0.2 + N_wallets × amountXrp ≤ 99

For each file, count N_wallets (sum of all createFunded count args + fundAddress calls across all it() blocks). Verify TICKET_COUNT × 0.2 + N_wallets × FUND_AMOUNT ≤ 99. Fix FUND_AMOUNT or TICKET_COUNT if over budget
Audit tests/e2e/channel/channel.network.test.ts (FUND_AMOUNT=2) — if any test funds a channel with >1 XRP, that wallet needs channel_amount + 2 XRP
Audit tests/e2e/deposit-preauth/deposit-preauth.network.test.ts (FUND_AMOUNT=2, TICKET_COUNT=30) — reduce TICKET_COUNT if actual wallet count is lower
Reduce any TICKET_COUNT that is higher than actual N_wallets (excess tickets waste 0.2 XRP each)
Do NOT change test assertions or logic — only funding amounts and ticket counts
